summary: Created craft-profile.json with 16 craft tools selected from the 26-tool toolbox. Selected tools cluster into four functional groups: STRUCTURAL (T6 Stakes Escalation, T7 Black Moment, T8 Internal+External Resistance, T12 Dual-Arc Interleave, T13 Tension Mapping), TRACKING (T15 Foreshadowing Ledger, T18 Information Asymmetry, T20 Emotional Throughline, T23 Mystery Box), THEMATIC (T16 Symbolic Motif, T25 Thematic Argument), and VOICE/TONE (T5 Tone Contract, T17 Voice Fingerprinting, T24 Subtext in Dialogue), plus T21 Vulnerability Ladder bridging structure and romance. 10 tools excluded with explicit rationale: baseline craft (T1, T2, T11), subsumed by selections (T9, T19, T22, T26), or incompatible with restrained prose style (T3, T4, T14).
